body: This PR just changes the `evaporation` function to calculate `hv_sfc = TD.latent_heat_vapor(param_set, T_0)` instead of `hv_sfc = cp_v * (T_sfc - T_0) + Lv_0`. These are equivalent, but the new calculation uses the Thermodynamics function instead.
title: Change evaporation function to use Thermodynamics function
